description:
Package version is 0.1.0, but README leaks internal sprint labels as if published SemVer:
- README.md:143 — "The flag surface above is exhaustive for v1.1.0."
- README.md:149 — "v1.1 adds the wiring for parallel per-site dispatch, NDJSON streaming..."
- README.md:139 — "byte-equivalent to v1.0"

A reader who installed 0.1.0 will be confused. Rewrite to use 0.1.x SemVer or clearly mark these as internal feature-cycle labels.

Acceptance: no bare v1.x references in README that read as published versions.

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED (recorded by orchestrator — worker committed but its subagent permission mode blocked bw writes). Commit 265838a on mutagen-hcs.3/readme-version-labels (base 76a143e).

Scope: README.md only. Removed all bare v1.x references that read as published SemVer (package is 0.1.0):
- README.md:139 (--max-concurrency row): dropped "byte-equivalent to v1.0" -> "Default `1` (fully serial)."
- README.md:143: "exhaustive for v1.1.0." -> "exhaustive."
- README.md:149: "v1.1 adds the wiring for parallel per-site dispatch..." -> "Mutagen includes the wiring for parallel per-site dispatch..."

Left untouched (verified): JSON output-schema "version":"1" literals at README.md:186-189 (schema version, not package version); README.md:11 "as of v0.1.0" (actual package version).
Acceptance: grep -nE 'v1\.[01]' README.md returns nothing.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3 (subagent agent-averify-hcs3-60b10c56e8052d4d)
Log: ~/.claude/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3/subagents/agent-averify-hcs3-60b10c56e8052d4d.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 1 (README.md only? yes) — 4 insertions / 4 deletions

Semantic checks:
- Bare v1.x published-version references remaining: 0 (grep -nE 'v1\.[01]' and grep -niE 'v1\.[0-9]' both return nothing, exit 1)
- JSON-schema "version":"1" literals untouched: yes (README.md:186-189 unchanged; not in diff)
- "as of v0.1.0" untouched: yes (README.md:11 unchanged)
- Reworded sentences read correctly / table row intact: yes
  - L139 (--max-concurrency row): "Default `1` (fully serial)." — 5-pipe table cell intact, valid markdown
  - L143: "The flag surface above is exhaustive." — reads correctly
  - L149: "Mutagen includes the wiring for parallel per-site dispatch, NDJSON streaming, and `:telemetry` events." — grammatical; [Parallel mode](#parallel-mode-and-observability) link preserved

Verdict: PASS

Notes: Implementation exactly matches the IMPLEMENTED comment. Acceptance ("no bare v1.x references that read as published versions") fully met. The only v0/v1 strings remaining are the legitimate package version (v0.1.0) and the schema "version":"1" literals, both intentionally preserved.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit)
Session: 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3.jsonl

Reasoning: VERIFY reported PASS — single-file README-only doc change, 0 scope violations, acceptance met (no bare v1.x published-version references; JSON-schema "version":"1" literals and the real v0.1.0 left untouched), reworded sentences/table/link intact. No product code, no test logic. No auditor spawned per selective-audit policy.

title: Reconcile README v1.0/v1.1 version labels with 0.1.0
